title: nuc-fluxcd values
description: Schema for nuc-fluxcd Helm chart values.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in generated labels.

commonLabels.description: Labels merged into every rendered resource.

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations merged into every rendered resource.

apiVersions.description: Default API version overrides per supported Flux kind.

alerts.description: Map of Alert resources keyed by resource name.

artifactGenerators.description: Map of ArtifactGenerator resources keyed by resource name.

buckets.description: Map of Bucket resources keyed by resource name.

externalArtifacts.description: Map of ExternalArtifact resources keyed by resource name.

gitRepositories.description: Map of GitRepository resources keyed by resource name.

helmCharts.description: Map of HelmChart resources keyed by resource name.

helmReleases.description: Map of HelmRelease resources keyed by resource name.

helmRepositories.description: Map of HelmRepository resources keyed by resource name.

imagePolicies.description: Map of ImagePolicy resources keyed by resource name.

imageRepositories.description: Map of ImageRepository resources keyed by resource name.

imageUpdateAutomations.description: Map of ImageUpdateAutomation resources keyed by resource name.

kustomizations.description: Map of Kustomization resources keyed by resource name.

ociRepositories.description: Map of OCIRepository resources keyed by resource name.

providers.description: Map of Provider resources keyed by resource name.

receivers.description: Map of Receiver resources keyed by resource name.

freeFormObject.description: Arbitrary Flux custom resource payload passed through by the chart.
